{{Short description|Pornographic film award presented annually by AVN}}
{{Use Indian English|date=January 2026}}
{{Use mdy dates|date=January 2026}}
{{Infobox film award
| name = [[AVN Award]] for Male Foreign Performer of the Year
| image = Marcello Bravo and Little Caprice at the Venus Berlin 2018 (cropped).jpg
| image_size = 
| alt = 
| caption = The 2026 recipient: [[Marcello Bravo]]
| subheader = AVN award for contributions of foreign [[pornographic actor#Male performers|male performers]] to [[pornography]]
| awarded_for = Best Performance by a Foreign [[pornographic actor#Male performers|Male Performer]] 
| presenter = [[AVN Media Network]]
| sponsor = [[AVN (magazine)|''AVN'']]
| country = [[United States|USA]]
| location = [[Las Vegas]]
| firstawarded = {{start date and age|2003}}
| lastawarded = 2026
| reward = 
| former name = 
| holder_label = Most recent winner
| holder =  [[Marcello Bravo]]<br />{{flag|Austria}}
| most_wins = {{flagicon|Italy}} [[Rocco Siffredi]]<br>(10 awards)
| award1_type = Total awarded
| award1_winner = 24
| award2_type = First winner
| award2_winner = [[Rocco Siffredi]]<br />{{flag|Italy}}
| most_nominations = {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Nacho Vidal]] and {{flagicon|France}} David Perry<br>(12 nominations)
| website        = {{URL|http://avnawards.avn.com}}
}}
[[File:LocationUSA.png|thumb|600px|{{legend|#00703C|[[United States of America|USA]] (ineligible for competition)|border=1px #555 solid}}]]
The '''AVN Award for Male Foreign Performer of the Year''' is an award that has been given annually by the [[sex industry]] company [[AVN (magazine)|''AVN'']] since the award's inception in 2003.<ref name="avnnom2003">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20021127014135/http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.shtml|title=AVN Award Nominees|work=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|archive-date=November 27, 2002|url=http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.shtml|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref name="avnnom2002">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20011208103701/http://www.avnawards.com/nomin-list.html|title=AVN Awards Nominees|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=December 8, 2001|url=http://www.avnawards.com/nomin-list.html|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref>

The first recipient of the award was [[Italians|Italian]]-born pornographic actor [[Rocco Siffredi]] who was awarded at the [[20th AVN Awards]] in 2003.<ref name="avnwin2003"/> As of 2026, twelve pornographic actors have been awarded who are of five different nationalities: [[Italians|Italian]] (eleven), [[British people|British]] and [[French people|French]] (four), [[Germans|German]] and [[Spaniards|Spanish]] (two), [[Austrians|Austrian]] (one).

[[Italians|Italian]] pornographic actor [[Rocco Siffredi]] is the most honoured actor with ten awards followed by [[British people|British]] pornographic actor Danny D with three awards and [[Germans|German]] pornographic actor [[Steve Holmes (actor)|Steve Holmes]] with two awards.<ref name="avnwin2005">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140118084336/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2005|title=2005 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=January 18, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2005|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref name="avnwin2006">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140222223329/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2006|title=2006 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=February 22, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2006|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref> [[Rocco Siffredi]] is the oldest recipient of the award at the age of 56 in 2021 and Danny D is the youngest recipient of the award at the age of 29 in 2017. [[Italians|Italian]] pornographic actor [[Rocco Siffredi]] is the only performer to have won in three different decades—the 2000s, 2010s, and 2020s. The most recent winner of the award is [[Austrians|Austrian]] pornographic actor [[Marcello Bravo]], who was awarded at the [[43rd AVN Awards]] in 2026.<ref name="Winners2026"/>

==Overview==
{|Class="wikitable"
! Performer country of origin
! Title(s)
! No. of performer(s)
|-
|{{flag icon|Italy}} [[Pornography in Italy|Italy]]
|11
|2
|-
|{{flag icon|United Kingdom}} [[Pornography in the United Kingdom|United Kingdom]]
|4
|2
|-
|{{flag icon|France}} [[Pornography in Europe#France|France]]
|4
|4
|-
|{{flag icon|Germany}} [[Pornography in Europe#Germany|Germany]]
|2
|1
|-
|{{flag icon|Spain}} [[Pornography in Europe#Spain|Spain]]
|2
|2
|-
|{{flag icon|Austria}} [[Pornography in Austria|Austria]]
|1
|1
|}

==Winners and nominees==
<!-- Images of multiple winners are only given here -->
[[File:Rocco Siffredi (promo photo).jpg|thumb|upright|[[Rocco Siffredi]] has been the most frequent winner of the award (ten times).]]
{{multiple image
<!-- Essential parameters -->
| align     = right
| direction = vertical
| footer    =  
| width     = 170
<!-- Image 1 -->
| image1    = Danny Dong (cropped).jpg
| width1    = 130
| alt1      = Danny D
| caption1  = Danny D has won the award three times.

<!-- Image 2 -->
| image2    = Steve Holmes 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg
| width2    = 130
| alt2      = Steve Holmes
| caption2  = [[Steve Holmes (actor)|Steve Holmes]] has won the award two times.
}}
===2000s===
{|Class="wikitable sortable"
! Year
! Photo
! Winner
! Nationality
! Nominees
! {{Abbr|Ref(s)|References}}
|-
|[[20th AVN Awards|2003<br/>{{small|(20th)}}]]
|[[File:Rocco Siffredi 2010.jpg|180px]]
! [[Rocco Siffredi]]
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Italians|Italian]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} [[Christoph Clark]]
* {{flagicon|Germany}} [[Steve Holmes (actor)|Steve Holmes]]
* {{flagicon|Netherlands}} Alberto Rey
* {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Toni Ribas]]
* {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Nacho Vidal]]
|<ref name="avnwin2003">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131029194214/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2003|title=2003 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=October 29, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2003|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite AV media |people=Stone, Mark (Director) |year=2003 |title=AVN 20th Anniversary Awards Show |medium=DVD |location=Chatsworth, California |publisher=VCA Labs, Inc. }}</ref><ref name="avnnom2003"/>
|-
|[[21st AVN Awards|2004<br/>{{small|(21st)}}]]
|[[File:Manuel Ferrara 2010.jpg|180px]]
! [[Manuel Ferrara]]
|{{flagicon|France}} [[French people|French]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Frank Gun
* {{flagicon|Germany}} Steve Holmes
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Denis Marti
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Toni Ribas
* {{flagicon|Venezuela}} Franco Roccaforte
* {{flagicon|Italy}} [[Rocco Siffredi]]
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
|<ref name="avnwin2004">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131205023920/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2004|title=2004 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=December 5, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2004|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite AV media |people=Miller, Gary (Director) |date=August 1, 2004 |title=2004 AVN Awards Show (Hardcore Edition) |medium=DVD |location=Chatsworth, California |publisher=AVN Publications/LFP Video }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |last=Rutter |first=Jared |date=March 2004 |title=All Grown Up Gala Turns Out to be Big Night for Evil Angel, Wicked, Jules Jordan |magazine=Adult Video News |location=Chatsworth, California |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |volume=20 |issue=3 |pages=38–113 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |title=The Porn Awards Winners & Coozers |magazine=Genesis |location=Paramus, New Jersey |publisher=Genesis Publications, Inc. |issue=86 |pages=142–143 |issn=1052-8555 |date=June 2004 }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=August 2004 |title=Prize Winning Porno |magazine=Cheri Magazine |location=New York, New York |publisher=Cheri Magazine, Inc. |volume=29 |issue=1 |pages=106–117 |issn=1059-7131 }}</ref><ref name="avnnom2004">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20031203023916/http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/05/58/32/55832Nominations.pdf |title=AVN Award Nominees|work=AVN|archive-date=December 3, 2003|url=http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/05/58/32/55832Nominations.pdf |access-date=January 30, 2016}}</ref>
|-
|[[22nd AVN Awards|2005<br/>{{small|(22nd)}}]]
|rowspan="2"|[[File:Steve Holmes 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg|180px]]
! rowspan="2"|[[Steve Holmes (actor)|Steve Holmes]]
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[Germans|German]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Austria}} [[Mick Blue]]
* {{flagicon|Germany}} [[Chris Charming]]
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Denis Marti
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Toni Ribas
* {{flagicon|Venezuela}} Franco Roccaforte
* {{flagicon|France}} Tristan Seagal
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Rocco Siffredi
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
|<ref name="avnwin2005"/><ref>{{cite magazine |last=Medoff |first=Marc |date=July 2005 |title=XXX Debauchery in the Desert! |magazine=Genesis |location=Paramus, New Jersey, U.S.A. |publisher=Genesis Publications, Inc. |issue=100 |pages=34–37 |issn=1052-8555 }}</ref><ref name="avnnom2005">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20041114124447/http://www.avnawards.com/2005nominees_fr.shtml|title=2005 Nominees|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=November 14, 2004 |url=http://www.avnawards.com/2005nominees_fr.shtml|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref>
|-
|[[23rd AVN Awards|2006<br/>{{small|(23rd)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Uruguay}} [[Marco Banderas]]
* {{flagicon|Austria}} Mick Blue
* {{flagicon|}} Dillon
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Frank Gun
* {{flagicon|Brazil}} Kid Jamaica
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Denis Marti
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Toni Ribas
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Rocco Siffredi
|<ref name="avnwin2006"/><ref>{{cite AV media |people=Miller, Gary (Director) |year=2006 |title=2006 AVN Awards |medium=DVD |location=U.S.A. |publisher=Spice Studios/CinemaPlay Entertainment }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |last=Rutter |first=Jared |date=March 2006 |title=Sin City Sextacular: AVN Awards Sail Smoothly as ''Pirates'' Plunders a ''Devil'' of a Night |magazine=Adult Video News |location=Chatsworth, California, U.S.A. |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |volume=22 |issue=3 |pages=48–116 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref><ref name="avnnom2006">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20051126013107/http://www.avnawards.com/2006nominations.pdf|title=2006 Nominations|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=November 26, 2005 |url=http://www.avnawards.com/2006nominations.pdf|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref>
|-
|[[24th AVN Awards|2007<br/>{{small|(24th)}}]]
|
! [[Jean Val Jean (actor)|Jean Val Jean]]
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|France}} [[French people|French]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Austria}} Mick Blue
* {{flagicon|France}} [[Greg Centauro]]
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Tony DeSergio
* {{flagicon|Ireland}} Jazz Duro
* {{flagicon|Italy}} [[Omar Galanti]]
* {{flagicon|Germany}} Steve Holmes
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Denis Marti
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|Morocco}} Zenza Raggi
* {{flagicon|Venezuela}} Franco Roccaforte
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Toni Ribas
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Rocco Siffredi
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
|<ref name="avnwin2007">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140222222149/https://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2007|title=2007 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=February 22, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2007|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.avn.com/index.php?Primary_Navigation=Articles&Action=View_Article&Content_ID=281743 |title=2007 AVN Award Winners Announced |author=AVN |date=January 16, 2007 |access-date=January 9, 2016 |url-status=bot: unknown |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070807230746/http://www.avn.com/index.php?Primary_Navigation=Articles&Action=View_Article&Content_ID=281743 |archive-date=August 7, 2007 }}</ref><ref name="avnnom2007">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070423104247/http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/27/84/74/2784742007UpdatedNominations|title=AVN Award Nominations|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=April 23, 2007 |url=http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/27/84/74/2784742007UpdatedNominations|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref>
|-
|[[25th AVN Awards|2008<br/>{{small|(25th)}}]]
|
! David Perry
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Austria}} Mick Blue
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman
* {{flagicon|France}} Greg Centauro
* {{flagicon|Ireland}} Jazz Duro
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Omar Galanti
* {{flagicon|Germany}} Steve Holmes
* {{flagicon|Brazil}} Kid Jamaica
* {{flagicon|France}} Joachim Kessef
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Frank Major
* {{flagicon|Morocco}} Zenza Raggi
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Toni Ribas
* {{flagicon|Venezuela}} Franco Roccaforte
* {{flagicon|France}} [[Ian Scott (actor)|Ian Scott]]
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
|<ref name="avnwin2008">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131203050255/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2008|title=2008 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=December 3, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2008 |access-date=July 4, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.avn.com/video/articles/2759.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20080404082611/http://www.avn.com/video/articles/2759.html|archive-date=April 4, 2008|title=2008 AVN Awards Winners Announced|author=Jared Rutter|work=AVN.com|access-date=January 17, 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.xbiz.com/news/news_piece.php?id=88772&mi=all&q=2008+avn|title=AVN Announces 2008 Adult Movie Awards Winners|author=Steve Javors|work=Xbiz.com|access-date=January 17, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150417010452/http://www.xbiz.com/news/news_piece.php?id=88772&mi=all&q=2008+avn|archive-date=April 17, 2015|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref name="avnnom2008">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20080227073556/http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2008Nominations.pdf |title=2008 Nominations|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=February 27, 2008|url=http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2008Nominations.pdf|access-date=July 4, 2016}}</ref>
|-
|[[26th AVN Awards|2009<br/>{{small|(26th)}}]]
|[[File:Rocco Siffredi 2010.jpg|180px]]
! [[Rocco Siffredi]]
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Italians|Italian]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman
* {{flagicon|Ireland}} Jazz Duro
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Omar Galanti
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Lauro Giotto
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Frank Gun
* {{flagicon|Germany}} Steve Holmes
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Nick Lang
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Keiran Lee]]
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|Morocco}} Zenza Raggi
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Toni Ribas
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Oliver Sanchez
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
|<ref name="avnwin2009">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/2009-AVN-Award-Winners-Announced-56551.html|title=AVN - 2009 AVN Award-Winners Announced|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|last=Sullivan|first=David|date=January 11, 2009|access-date=July 4, 2016|archive-date=May 3, 2012|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120503094829/http://business.avn.com/articles/2009-AVN-Award-Winners-Announced-56551.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref name="avnnom2009">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090105164506/http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2009_AVN_NOMINATIONS_11_25_08.pdf|title=2009 AVN Nominations|work=AVN|archive-date=January 5, 2009|url=http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2009_AVN_NOMINATIONS_11_25_08.pdf|access-date=July 4, 2016}}</ref>
|}

===2010s===
{|Class="wikitable sortable"
! Year
! Photo
! Winner
! Nationality
! Nominees
! {{Abbr|Ref(s)|References}}
|-
|[[27th AVN Awards|2010<br/>{{small|(27th)}}]]
|[[File:Toni Ribas at AVN Awards 2016.jpg|180px]]
! [[Toni Ribas]]
|{{flagicon|Spain}} [[Spaniards|Spanish]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Devil
* {{flagicon|Germany}} Steve Holmes
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Ireland}} Jazz Duro
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Omar Galanti
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Choky Ice
* {{flagicon|France}} JPX
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|Morocco}} Zenza Raggi
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Oliver Sanchez
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Rocco Siffredi
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
|<ref name="avnwin2010">{{cite web|url=http://www.xbiz.com/news/116352 |title=2010 AVN Adult Movie Awards Winners Announced|work=XBIZ|publisher=Adnet Media|last=Johnson|first=Bob|date=January 11, 2010|access-date=July 24, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/2010-AVN-Award-Winners-Announced-378238.html|title=2010 AVN Award Winners Announced|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|access-date=December 31, 2014|archive-date=July 8, 2012|archive-url=https://archive.today/20120708134222/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/2010-AVN-Award-Winners-Announced-378238.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite press release|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-2010-AVN-Awards-Announced-370904.html|title=Nominations for 2010 AVN Awards Announced|work=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|date=December 2, 2009|access-date=January 18, 2013|archive-date=March 9, 2013|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130309144055/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-2010-AVN-Awards-Announced-370904.html|url-status=dead}}</ref>
|-
|[[28th AVN Awards|2011<br/>{{small|(28th)}}]]
|rowspan="6"|[[File:Rocco Siffredi 2010.jpg|180px]]
! rowspan="6"|[[Rocco Siffredi]]
|rowspan="6"|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Italians|Italian]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Demetri XXX
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Devil
* {{flagicon|Ireland}} Jazz Duro
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Omar Galanti
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Frank Gun
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Choky Ice
* {{flagicon|Brazil}} Kid Jamaica
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Frank Major
* {{flagicon|Romania}} Mugur
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Toni Ribas
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Oliver Sanchez
* {{flagicon|France}} Ian Scott
|<ref name="avnwin2011">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2011-AVN-Awards-421782.html|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2011 AVN Awards|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|date=January 9, 2011|access-date=July 24, 2016|archive-date=January 10, 2011|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110110172712/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2011-AVN-Awards-421782.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite press release | url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-the-2011-AVN-Awards-Announced-418152.html | title=Nominations for the 2011 AVN Awards Announced | publisher=Adult Video News | date=November 29, 2010 | access-date=January 15, 2013 | archive-date=January 16, 2013 | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130116233533/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-the-2011-AVN-Awards-Announced-418152.html | url-status=dead }}</ref>
|-
|[[29th AVN Awards|2012<br/>{{small|(29th)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Cristian Devil
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Omar Galanti
* {{flagicon|Russia}} Timo Hardy
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Choky Ice
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Nick Lang
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|France}} Tristan Segal
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
* {{flagicon|Belgium}} [[Pascal White]]
|<ref name="avnwin2012">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-2012-AVN-Award-Winners-461715.html|title=AVN Announces the 2012 AVN Award Winners|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|date=January 22, 2012|access-date=July 2, 2016|archive-date=June 29, 2012|archive-url=https://archive.today/20120629195808/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-2012-AVN-Award-Winners-461715.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>[http://forum.adultdvdtalk.com/the-2012-avn-awards-winners "The 2012 AVN Awards Winners"] {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220112204747/https://forum.adultdvdtalk.com/the-2012-avn-awards-winners |date=January 12, 2022 }}, ''Adult DVD Talk'', January 2012</ref><ref name="avnnom2012">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130329124455/http://avnawards.avn.com/2012_AVN_Awards_nominations.pdf|title=2012 AVN Award Nominations|work=AVN|archive-date=March 29, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/2012_AVN_Awards_nominations.pdf|access-date=July 24, 2016}}</ref>
|-
|[[30th AVN Awards|2013<br/>{{small|(30th)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Cristian Devil
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Leny Ewil
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Omar Galanti
* {{flagicon|Russia}} Timo Hardy
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Choky Ice
* {{flagicon|Romania}} Mugur
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|France}} Ian Scott
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Kai Taylor
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
* {{flagicon|Belgium}} Pascal White
|<ref name="avnwin2013">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/The-2013-AVN-Award-Winners-503520.html|title=The 2013 AVN Award Winners!|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=July 2, 2016|archive-date=March 28, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150328015659/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/The-2013-AVN-Award-Winners-503520.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref name="avnnom2013">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130328092725/http://avnawards.avn.com/2013_nominations.pdf|title=2013 Nominations|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=March 28, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/2013_nominations.pdf|access-date=July 24, 2016}}</ref>
|-
|[[31st AVN Awards|2014<br/>{{small|(31st)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Omar Galanti
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Lauro Giotto
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Choky Ice
* {{flagicon|Brazil}} Kid Jamaica
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Nick Lang
* {{flagicon|Romania}} Mugur
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Neeo
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|France}} Ian Scott
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
|<ref name="avnwin2014">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2014-AVN-Awards-544448.html|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2014 AVN Awards|work=AVN|date=January 21, 2014|access-date=February 7, 2016|archive-date=February 1, 2016|archive-url=https://archive.today/20160201103626/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2014-AVN-Awards-544448.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref name="avnnom2014">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140126094717/http://avnawards.avn.com/page/3|title=AVN Awards|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=January 26, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/page/3|access-date=July 24, 2016}}</ref>
|-
|[[32nd AVN Awards|2015<br/>{{small|(32nd)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Omar Galanti
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Lauro Giotto
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Choky Ice
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Neeo
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|France}} Ian Scott
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Renato
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Ryan Ryder
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Thomas Stone
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
|<ref name="avnwin2015">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150128010221/http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/5|archive-date=January 28, 2015|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/5|title=AVN - 2015 AVN Awards Show|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine|title=AVN Awards 2015 Twitter feed|url=https://twitter.com/avnawards|magazine=Adult Video News|access-date=January 25, 2015}}</ref>{{Primary source inline|date=February 2024}}<ref>{{cite web|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2015 AVN Awards|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2015-AVN-Awards-585973.html|website=AVN.com|publisher=Adult Video News|access-date=January 25, 2015|archive-date=February 6, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150206165744/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2015-AVN-Awards-585973.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|last1=vanzetti|title=AVN Awards Nominations 2015: Intro and Errata|date=November 28, 2014|url=http://blog.iafd.com/2014/11/28/avn-awards-nominations-2015-intro-and-errata/|publisher=[[Internet Adult Film Database]]|access-date=January 17, 2015}}</ref>
|-
|[[33rd AVN Awards|2016<br/>{{small|(33rd)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Clay
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Choky Ice
* {{flagicon|Romania}} Mugur
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Neeo
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Renato
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Ryan Ryder
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Marc Rose
* {{flagicon|France}} Ian Scott
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
|<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/winners|title=2016 AVN Awards Winners|access-date=January 24, 2016|date=January 24, 2016|magazine=AVN|archive-date=November 28, 2016|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20161128025847/http://avnawards.avn.com/winners/|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2016-AVN-Awards-620416.html |title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2016 AVN Awards |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=January 23, 2016 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 24, 2016 |archive-date=January 26, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160126155756/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2016-AVN-Awards-620416.html |url-status=dead }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=https://twitter.com/avnawards?lang=en |title=#avnawards2016 |last1=@avnawards |date=January 24, 2016 |via=Twitter |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 24, 2016}}</ref>{{Primary source inline|date=February 2024}}<ref>{{cite web|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/8 |title=2016 AVN AWARD NOMINATIONS |access-date=November 20, 2015 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151120162020/http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/8 |archive-date=November 20, 2015 }}</ref>
|-
|[[34th AVN Awards|2017<br/>{{small|(34th)}}]]
|[[File:Danny Dong (cropped).jpg|180px]]
! Danny D
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[British people|British]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Clay
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Chris Diamond
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Pablo Ferrari
* {{flagicon|France}} Joss Lescaf
* {{flagicon|Romania}} Mugur
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Neeo
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Marc Rose
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Ryan Ryder
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Sabby
* {{flagicon|France}} Yanick Shaft
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Rocco Siffredi
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
|<ref name="Winners">{{cite web |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2017-avn-award-winners-announced-712151.html |title=2017 AVN Award Winners Announced |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=January 21, 2017 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 22, 2017}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=https://twitter.com/avnawards?lang=en |title=AVN Awards |last1=@avnawards |date=January 22, 2017 |via=Twitter |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 22, 2017}}</ref>{{Primary source inline|date=February 2024}}<ref>{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees |title=AVN Awards 2017 Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=November 17, 2016|magazine=Adult Video News|access-date=July 12, 2017|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170113172207/https://avn.com/awards/nominees |archive-date=January 13, 2017}}</ref>
|-
|[[35th AVN Awards|2018<br/>{{small|(35th)}}]]
|
! Ryan Ryder
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Emilio Ardana
* {{flagicon|France}} Alberto Blanco
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Kristof Cale
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Chris Diamond
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Pablo Ferrari
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Luke Hardy
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Juan Lucho
* {{flagicon|Hungary}} Renato
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Marc Rose
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Rocco Siffredi
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
* {{flagicon|Belgium}} Pascal White
|<ref name="Winners2018">{{cite web |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2018-avn-award-winners-announced-759869.html |title=2018 AVN Award Winners Announced |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=January 28, 2018 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=February 4, 2018}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=https://twitter.com/avnawards?lang=en |title=AVN Awards |last1=@avnawards |date=January 27, 2018 |via=Twitter |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 27, 2018}}</ref>{{Primary source inline|date=February 2024}}<ref name="nominees">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/nominees-unveiled-for-2018-avn-awards-751192.html |title=Nominees Unveiled for 2018 AVN Awards |author=Peter Warren |date=November 18, 2017 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=February 4, 2018}}</ref>
|-
|[[36th AVN Award|2019<br/>{{small|(36th)}}]]
|[[File:Rocco Siffredi 2010.jpg|180px]]
! [[Rocco Siffredi]]
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Italians|Italian]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Alberto Blanco
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Kristof Cale
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Clay
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Charlie Dean
* {{flagicon|France}} Dorian del Isla
* {{flagicon|Canada}} [[Erik Everhard]]
* {{flagicon|France}} Anthony Gaultier
* {{flagicon|France}} Joss Lescaf
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Juan Lucho
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Lutro
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Ryan Ryder
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Nacho Vidal
|<ref name="Winners2019">{{cite magazine |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2019-avn-813648.html|title=2019 AVN Award Winners Announced|date=January 27, 2019|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref><ref name="OfficialTwitter">{{cite web |url=https://twitter.com/avnawards/status/1089437432511000576 |title=AVN Awards|last1=@avnawards|date=January 27, 2019|via=Twitter |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=November 24, 2019}}</ref>{{Primary source inline|date=February 2024}}<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees|title=2019 Nominees AVN Awards|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=January 28, 2019}}</ref>
|}

===2020s===
{|Class="wikitable sortable"
! Year
! Photo
! Winner
! Nationality
! Nominees
! {{Abbr|Ref(s)|References}}
|-
|[[37th AVN Awards|2020<br/>{{small|(37th)}}]]
|[[File:Danny Dong (cropped).jpg|180px]]
! Danny D
|{{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[British people|British]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Alberto Blanco
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Kristof Cale
* {{flagicon|France}} Vince Carter
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Clay
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Charlie Dean
* {{flagicon|France}} Dorian del Isla
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Chris Diamond
* {{flagicon|Canada}} Erik Everhard
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Angelo Godshack
* {{flagicon|France}} Joss Lescaf
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Lutro
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Neeo
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Rocco Siffredi
|<ref name="Winners2020">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2020-avn-award-winners-announced-863917.html|title=2020 AVN Award Winners Announced|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 25, 2020|access-date=January 28, 2020}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees|title=2020 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 21, 2019|access-date=November 23, 2019}}</ref>
|-
|[[38th AVN Awards|2021<br/>{{small|(38th)}}]]
|[[File:Rocco Siffredi 2010.jpg|180px]]
! [[Rocco Siffredi]]
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Italians|Italian]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Alberto Blanco
* {{flagicon|Austria}} [[Marcello Bravo]]
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Kristof Cale
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Clay
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Charlie Dean
* {{flagicon|France}} Dorian del Isla
* {{flagicon|Canada}} Erik Everhard
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Angelo Godshack
* {{flagicon|Ghana}} Freddy Gong
* {{flagicon|France}} Vince Karter
* {{flagicon|France}} Joss Lescaf
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Jay Snakes
|<ref name="Winners2021">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2021-avn-award-winners-announced-895732.html|title=2021 AVN Award Winners Announced|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 23, 2021|access-date=February 23, 2021}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2021_nominees|title=2021 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 29, 2020|access-date=November 30, 2020}}</ref>
|-
|[[39th AVN Awards|2022<br/>{{small|(39th)}}]]
|
! Alberto Blanco
|{{flagicon|Spain}} [[Spaniards|Spanish]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Sam Bourne
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Tommy Cabrio
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Kristof Cale
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Clay
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Raul Costa
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Charlie Dean
* {{flagicon|France}} Dorian del Isla
* {{flagicon|Canada}} Erik Everhard
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Maximum Garcia
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Angelo Godshack
* {{flagicon|Ghana}} Freddy Gong
* {{flagicon|France}} Vince Carter
* {{flagicon|France}} Joss Lescaf
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Steve Q
|<ref name="Winners2022">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/winners|title=2022 AVN Award Winners Announced|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 22, 2022|access-date=January 24, 2022}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2022_nominees|title=2022 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 19, 2021|access-date=November 27, 2021}}</ref>
|-
|[[40th AVN Awards|2023<br/>{{small|(40th)}}]]
|[[File:Danny Dong (cropped).jpg|180px]]
! Danny D
|{{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[British people|British]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Alberto Blanco
* {{flagicon|Austria}} Marcello Bravo
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Kristof Cale
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Clay
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Charlie Dean
* {{flagicon|Curacao}} Darrell Deeps
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Chris Diamond
* {{flagicon|Canada}} Erik Everhard
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Maximo Garcia
* {{flagicon|France}} Vince Karter
* {{flagicon|France}} Joss Lescaf
* {{flagicon|France}} Ricky Mancini
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|Netherlands}} Aaron Rock
|<ref name="Winners2023">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2023-avn-award-winners-announced-914695.html|title=2023 AVN Award Winners Announced|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 8, 2023|access-date=January 10, 2023}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2023_nominees|title=2023 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 4, 2022|access-date=December 20, 2022}}</ref>
|-
|[[41st AVN Awards|2024<br/>{{small|(41st)}}]]
|
! Vince Karter
|{{flagicon|France}} [[French people|French]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Alberto Blanco
* {{flagicon|Austria}} Marcello Bravo
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Kristof Cale
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Clay
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Raul Costa
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Potro de Bilbao
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Charlie Dean
* {{flagicon|Canada}} Erik Everhard
* {{flagicon|Russia}} Tommy Gold
* {{flagicon|Ghana}} Freddy Gong
* {{flagicon|France}} David Perry
* {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Jordi El Niño Polla]]
* {{flagicon|Netherlands}} Aaron Rock
|<ref name="Winners2024">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2024-avn-award-winners-announced-926775.html|title=''2024 AVN Award Winners Announced''|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 28, 2024|accessdate=February 4, 2024}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2024_nominees|title=2024 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 15, 2023|access-date=November 15, 2023}}</ref>
|-
|[[42nd AVN Awards|2025<br/>{{small|(42nd)}}]]
|
! Christian Clay
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Italians|Italian]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Alberto Blanco
* {{flagicon|Austria}} Marcello Bravo
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Kristof Cale
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Raul Costa
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Potro de Bilbao
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Charlie Dean
* {{flagicon|Canada}} Erik Everhard
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Angelo Godshack
* {{flagicon|Russia}} Tommy Gold
* {{flagicon|Ukraine}} Matthew Meier
* {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Jordi El Niño Polla]]
* {{flagicon|Netherlands}} Aaron Rock
* {{flagicon|France}} Alex Romero
|<ref name="Winners2025">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2025-avn-award-winners-announced-926775.html|title=''2025 AVN Award Winners Announced''|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 31, 2025|accessdate=January 31, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2025_nominees|title=2025 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 30, 2024|access-date=December 1, 2024}}</ref>
|-
|[[43rd AVN Awards|2026<br/>{{small|(43rd)}}]]
|[[File:Marcello Bravo and Little Caprice at the Venus Berlin 2018 (cropped).jpg|180px]]
! [[Marcello Bravo]]
|{{flagicon|Austria}} [[Austrians|Austrian]]
|valign="top" |
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Alberto Blanco
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Jimmy Bud
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Kristof Cale
* {{flagicon|Italy}} Raul Costa
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Charlie Dean
* {{flagicon|Curacao}} Darrell Deeps
* {{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Angelo Godshack
* {{flagicon|Spain}} Juan Lucho
* {{flagicon|Ukraine}} Matthew Meier
* {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Jordi El Niño Polla]]
* {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Dimitri Shadow
* {{flagicon|France}} [[Ian Scott (actor)|Ian Scott]]
|<ref name="Winners2026">{{Cite web |date=January 24, 2026 |title=2026 AVN Award Winners Announced |url=https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971 |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20260125225505/https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971 |archive-date=January 25, 2026 |access-date=January 26, 2026 |work=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]] |language=en-US|last=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|publisher=AVN Media Network}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2026_nominees|title=2026 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 21, 2025|access-date=December 4, 2025}}</ref>
|}

==Superlatives==
{|class="wikitable"
! Superlative
! Performer
! Record
|-
|Performer with most awards
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Rocco Siffredi]]
|10
|-
|rowspan="2"|Performer(s) with most nominations
|{{flagicon|Spain}} [[Nacho Vidal]]
|rowspan="2"|12
|-
|{{flagicon|France}} David Perry
|-
|Performer with most consecutive wins
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Rocco Siffredi]]<br>{{small|(2011-16)}}
|6
|-
|Performer with most consecutive nominations
|{{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman<br>{{small|(2008-16)}}
|9
|-
|Performer with most nominations without ever winning
|{{flagicon|Spain}} [[Nacho Vidal]]
|12
|-
|Oldest winner
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Rocco Siffredi]]
|56
|-
|Youngest winner
|{{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
|29
|-
|Winner of the most decades
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Rocco Siffredi]]<br>{{small|(2000s, 2010s, 2020s)}}
|3 
|}

==Multiple winners and nominees==
===Multiple winners===
{|class="wikitable sortable"
! Wins
! Performer
! Years
|-
! 10
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Rocco Siffredi]]
|[[20th AVN Awards|2003]], [[26th AVN Awards|2009]], [[28th AVN Awards|2011]], [[29th AVN Awards|2012]], [[30th AVN Awards|2013]], [[31st AVN Awards|2014]], [[32nd AVN Awards|2015]], [[33rd AVN Awards|2016]], [[36th AVN Awards|2019]], [[38th AVN Awards|2021]]
|-
! 3
|{{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
|[[34th AVN Awards|2017]], [[37th AVN Awards|2020]], [[40th AVN Awards|2023]]
|-
! 2
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[Steve Holmes (actor)|Steve Holmes]]
|[[22nd AVN Awards|2005]], [[23rd AVN Awards|2006]]
|}

===Multiple nominees===
{|class="wikitable sortable"
! Nominations
! Performer
|-
! rowspan="2"|12
|{{flagicon|Spain}} [[Nacho Vidal]]
|-
|{{flagicon|France}} David Perry
|-
! 11
|{{flagicon|France}} Mike Angelo
|-
! 10
|{{flagicon|Czech Republic}} George Uhl
|-
! rowspan="2"| 9
|{{flagicon|Hungary}} James Brossman
|-
|{{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Danny D
|-
! 8
|{{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Kristof Cale
|-
! rowspan="5"|7
|{{flagicon|Spain}} [[Toni Ribas]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Hungary}} Choky Ice
|-
||{{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Clay
|-
|{{flagicon|France}} Alberto Blanco
|-
|{{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Charlie Dean
|-
! rowspan="6"|6
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Omar Galanti]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[Steve Holmes (actor)|Steve Holmes]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Italy}} [[Rocco Siffredi]]
|-
|{{flagicon|France}} Joss Lescaf
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} [[Erik Everhard]]
|-
|{{flagicon|France}} [[Ian Scott (actor)|Ian Scott]]
|-
! rowspan="3"|5
|{{flagicon|Romania}} Mugur
|-
|{{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Neeo
|-
|{{flagicon|Ireland}} Jazz Duro
|-
! rowspan="12"|4
|{{flagicon|Italy}} Denis Marti
|-
|{{flagicon|Venezuela}} Franco Roccaforte
|-
|{{flagicon|Austria}} [[Mick Blue]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} Zenna Raggi
|-
|{{flagicon|Hungary}} Frank Gun
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} Kid Jamaica
|-
|{{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Ryan Ryder
|-
|{{flagicon|France}} Dorian del Isla
|-
|{{flagicon|Spain}} Chris Diamond
|-
|{{flagicon|France}} Vince Carter
|-
|{{flagicon|Austria}} [[Marcello Bravo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Angelo Godshack
|-
! rowspan="12"|3
|{{flagicon|Italy}} Denis Marti
|-
|{{flagicon|Hungary}} Nick Lang
|-
|{{flagicon|Italy}} Christian Devil
|-
|{{flagicon|Spain}} Oliver Sanchez
|-
|{{flagicon|Hungary}} Lauro Giotto
|-
|{{flagicon|Hungary}} Renato
|-
|{{flagicon|United Kingdom}} Marc Rose
|-
|{{flagicon|Belgium}} [[Pascal White]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}} Freddy Gong
|-
|{{flagicon|Italy}} Raul Costa
|-
|{{flagicon|Spain}} Juan Lucho
|-
|{{flagicon|Spain}} [[Jordi El Niño Polla]]
|-
! rowspan="10"|2
|{{flagicon|France}} Tristan Segal
|-
|{{flagicon|France}} [[Greg Centauro]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Russia}} Timo Hardy
|-
|{{flagicon|Czech Republic}} Lutro
|-
|{{flagicon|Hungary}} Frank Major
|-
|{{flagicon|Spain}} Pablo Ferrari
|-
|{{flagicon|Spain}} Maximo Garcia
|-
|{{flagicon|Netherlands}} Aaron Rock
|-
|{{flagicon|Curacao}} Darrell Deeps
|-
|{{flagicon|Ukraine}} Matthew Meier
|-
|rowspan=14 |2026<ref>{{Cite web|title=2026 AVN Award Nominees Announced|url=https://avn.com/awards/2026_nominees|website=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|title=2026 AVN Award Winners Announced|url=https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971|website=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>
|rowspan=14 align=center|
|rowspan=14 align=center|'''Marcello Bravo'''
|align=center|Alberto Blanco
|-
|align=center|Jimmy Bud
|-
|align=center|Kristof Cale
|-
|align=center|Xander Corvus
|-
|align=center|Raul Costa
|-
|align=center|Danny D
|-
|align=center|Charlie Dean
|-
|align=center|Darrell Deeps
|-
|align=center|Angelo Godshack
|-
|align=center|Juan Lucho
|-
|align=center|Matthew Meier
|-
|align=center|Jordi El Niño Polla
|-
|align=center|Dimitri Shadow
|-
|align=center|Yanick Shaft
|}

==See also==
* [[AVN Award for Male Performer of the Year]]
* [[AVN Award for Best Actor]]
* [[AVN Award for Best Supporting Actor]]

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
* {{Official|http://avnawards.avn.com}}

{{Navboxes
|title=AVN Award for Male Foreign Performer of the Year
|list=
{{AVN}}
{{AVN Male Foreign}}
}}

[[Category:Awards established in 2003]]
[[Category:AVN Awards|Male Foreign Performer of the Year]]
[[Category:Awards for male actors]]
